name: LifeClean International AB (publ)
summary: Lifeclean International AB researches, produces, markets, and sells disinfection products in Sweden. It has developed a patented spore, fungal, biofilm, bacterial, and virus-killing surface disinfection for equipment and surfaces, such as floors, walls, furniture, and general roof surfaces. The company was founded in 2012 and is based in Uddevalla, Sweden.
